creator: ralf.van.dooren@snow.nl
text:
Hello,

Patch not approved. Must be patched within the original rsnapshot source, not
via the ports tree.

I have informed the submitter which will contact the rsnapshot maintainers.

Regards,

Ralf

Quoting Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>:

> Maintainer of sysutils/rsnapshot,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/126014 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126014
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 


-- 
Ralf van Dooren              Unix specialists
Senior consultant Snow B.V.  http://snow.nl
ralf.van.dooren@snow.nl      t: +31418 653333
